name: vigilantes
description: A senior-dev coding agent methodology: brainstorming, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, code review, and collaboration workflows that make coding agents think and act like senior engineers.

interface.shortDescription: Senior-dev methodology: brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Vigilantes transforms coding agents into senior engineers through a battle-tested methodology: phased brainstorming with tradeoff analysis, evidence-driven planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel subagent execution, structured code review, and disciplined branch completion.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature to this project.
